purpose: Record narrowly scoped corrections to stale derived public diagnostics while preserving original-package hashes.

results/main/mechanism_and_cost.csv.correction: Set reference retention to 33/80 = 0.4125 and replace obsolete one-pass runtime fields with the frozen repeated synchronized means.

results/robustness/architecture_coverage.correction: Classify all 33 C33 retained-reference cases as neutral before any floating-point gain comparison.

results/figure_data/tableS6_alibaba_semi.correction: Use the V2 mean captured oracle headroom of 65.42% and the final RCF-DTI public name.

results/figure_data/tableS5_oracle_diagn.correction: Label 75.00% as check-set-oracle/test-oracle agreement and add percent units.

results/figure_data/tableS7_architecture.correction: State that the unique-rescue-rate denominator is the number of feasible cases.

results/figure_data/tableS8_safety_acros.correction: State that switch and harmful-selection rates use all cases as the denominator.

results/figure_data/table4_component_abl.correction: Rebuild complete paper Table 4, including harmful alternative selection, 96.25% limit satisfaction, and the final RCF-DTI label.

results/figure_data/tableS4_bank_size.cs.correction: Identify the switch metric as reference replacement over all cases.

results/figure_data/table1_experimental_.correction: Synchronize the public configuration table with revised-paper Table 1 and the final 50-update wording.

results/figure_data/table2_baseline_fair.correction: Synchronize the RCF-DTI public name and target-side protocol descriptions with revised-paper Table 2.
